text: Here in this space, surrounded by glass, clean lines, and neon, I feel a sense of anticipation mixed with curiosity. Passing through the threshold into a vividly lit room branded with "R+D," I am reminded of how human ingenuity continually stretches the boundary between idea and reality. The wall speaks of rapid evolution, of research about connection and coexistence—an invitation to participate in the ongoing dialogue between the present and the future. I feel small yet involved, an observer among other thinkers, navigating both marvel and mild unease as I ponder the implications of our intertwined destinies with technology. It’s invigorating, slightly humbling, and very alive.
